## Sensitive Data

- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, private URLs, account identifiers, private source documents, or generated private research outputs.
- [ ] Any examples are synthetic, public-domain, or fully scrubbed.
- [ ] I did not add dependencies, paid-service assumptions, cloud infrastructure, or broad framework abstractions without explaining why.
